primary_sources.name: CMS Conditions for Coverage for End-Stage Renal Disease Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Federal regulatory requirements for dialysis facility operations, safety, and quality standards

primary_sources.name: AAMI Standards and Recommended Practices for Dialysis
primary_sources.relevance: Technical standards for water treatment systems and equipment maintenance in dialysis facilities

primary_sources.name: NKF KDOQI Clinical Practice Guidelines and Clinical Practice Recommendations for Hemodialysis Adequacy
primary_sources.relevance: Clinical guidelines that inform operational protocols and quality metrics for dialysis delivery

primary_sources.name: CDC Guidelines for Infection Prevention and Control in Outpatient Hemodialysis Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Infection control protocols essential for daily facility operations and emergency preparedness

secondary_sources.name: Handbook of Dialysis
secondary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive reference covering technical and operational aspects of dialysis facility management

gaps: Limited recent publications specifically addressing supply chain optimization for dialysis facilities
Sparse guidance on patient scheduling algorithms and chair utilization metrics
